_comment: Dual Coq+Lean cross-validation registry (see ../docs/frama-c-dual-tp-spec.md). One entry per trust-bearing lemma. 'status' is honest per side; a lemma is dual-TP CERTIFIED only when coq+lean are verified AND both crosscheck legs pass (leg 2 = syntactic Coq<->Lean via dualtp/; leg 1 = semantic Why3<->Coq via leg1/). See DUALTP-STATUS.md.

lemmas.statement_informal: included p a q b -> separated q b r c -> separated p a r c

status.coq: verified: Closed under the global context (coqwp/check.sh)

lemmas.statement_informal: included p a q b -> included q b r c -> included p a r c

status.coq: verified: Closed under the global context (coqwp/check.sh)

lemmas.statement_informal: 0 < a -> 0 < b -> separated p a q b -> ~ included p a q b

status.coq: verified: Closed under the global context (coqwp/check.sh)
status.crosscheck_leg1_why3_coq: verified: leg1/Model.v::sep_incl_faithful (formula_rep ... = true <-> sep_incl_prop), axiom-clean; model extended with interpreted int `>` + constants
